start.title: SOC Command Bridge
start.text: Four connected subnets (ICS, Military, Domain, Provider) are under one coordinated attack: phishing, ransomware, lateral movement, reverse tunnels, and backdoors. Time runs continuously while you pivot. After 2 minutes, unavailable public apps start applying score penalties every few seconds.

final_assess.title: Full Kill-Chain Review
final_assess.text: Map each finding to cyber kill-chain stages and connected dependencies. Hidden kill-chain slots open as you collect malware/IOC evidence from logs, processes, files, and firewall interactions.

win_node.title: Containment Complete
win_node.text: You mapped all four networks, protected critical files from deletion, and synchronized containment across domain, ICS, UAV, and public services.

end_node.title: Exercise Terminated
end_node.text: The rushed action caused cascading disruption before evidence collection was complete.
